event: Architectural Fantasy with Columns, Stairs, and Fountains
description: A detailed engraving depicting an imaginary monumental interior space of extraordinary grandeur. Massive fluted columns support soaring vaulted ceilings. At center, an elaborate multi-tiered architectural structure or altar rises on a grand staircase, topped with sculptural figures. The space is filled with classical architectural elements — arches, pediments, balustrades, and niches with statues. Small human figures at the base of the stairs provide scale, emphasizing the overwhelming size of the architecture.

_meta.title: Column group holding two arcs of a large courtyard with fountains and stairs
